name: every-ear
description: Self-hosted live translation for events. Runs on macOS and Windows 11.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:build: npm run desktop:build:backend && npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:build:main
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:build:backend && npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run dev --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run desktop:fetch-binaries && npm run desktop:build && npm run dist:mac --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run desktop:fetch-binaries && npm run desktop:build && npm run dist:win --prefix desktop
